steps.title: Identify the logical relationship between the sentences
steps.content: The passage gives one example at the University of Texas, then pivots to a second example at Howard University — a different institution in a different place. The blank must signal movement to another location while continuing the same illustrative series.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong transitions and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Work through each choice:
  • Choice A — In other words,: signals restatement or clarification. The Howard example is a separate illustration, not a rephrasing of the UT example. ✗
  • Choice B — Elsewhere,: signals a shift to another location while maintaining the same function — exactly right for moving from UT to Howard as a parallel example. ✓
  • Choice C — Thus,: signals a conclusion drawn from prior evidence. The Howard example is not a conclusion; it is another supporting example. ✗
  • Choice D — In particular,: signals a narrowing specification. Howard is not a subset of the University of Texas; it is a separate institution. ✗
That is the correct answer.
